simpleExplanation.title: Supply — explained simply

faq.q: Is this Economics Supply lesson free?
faq.a: Yes — every topic in our 2281 course is free. MarkScheme offers free past-paper marking so you can turn notes into marks.
Scroll to the past-paper section on this page — we surface real Cambridge questions tagged to 2.4 from our mark-scheme library.

sections.content: Welcome to your **free Economics** lesson on **Supply** (2.4). This is syllabus point 2.4 on **Paper 1 (Multiple Choice) & Paper 2 (Structured Questions)** — structured like a premium revision course, with past-paper practice built in.

items: Master the vocabulary examiners use in mark schemes for Supply

Use “Explain simpler” below if the main lesson feels too advanced

sections.content: Cambridge 2281 rewards clear definitions, labelled diagrams, and applied examples from the data. On Paper 1 (Multiple Choice) & Paper 2 (Structured Questions), Supply often appears as MC items or structured questions — plan before writing longer answers.
